title: Expression evaluates to 1'bx instead of expected 1'b0

features.name: shift amount from concatenation with reduction operator
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is computed from a concatenation that includes a reduction operator on the same variable being shifted

features.name: non-blocking assignment with computed shift amount
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment in a sequential always block where the assigned value involves a shift operation with a shift amount computed via concatenation
